@extends("layout.html") @define("content") {

${pageTitle}

@// --- Expressions & Filters ---

Expressions & Filters

Welcome, ${userName | upper}!

Slug: ${pageTitle | slug}

Truncated: ${longText | truncate 20 "..."}

URL: ${searchQuery | urlencode}

Reversed: ${userName | reverse}

Title Case: ${lowercaseText | title}

Padded ID: ${userId | padstart 6 "0"}

@// --- Conditionals ---

Conditionals

@if(isAdmin) {

Admin Controls

} @elseif(isModerator) {

Moderator Controls

} @else {

Regular User View

}
@// --- Loops with arrays ---

Product Catalog

@for(product in products) {

${product.name}

$${product.price}

@if(product.onSale) { SALE! }

Tags: @for(j, tag in product.tags) { @if(j > 0) {, }${tag | lower} }

} @empty {

No products available.

}
@// --- Loop metadata ---

Loop Metadata

    @for(color in colors) {
  • ${loop.index1}. ${color} (index=${loop.index}, first=${loop.first}, last=${loop.last})
    • }
@// --- Hash iteration ---

Configuration

@for(key, val in settings) {
${key}
${val}
}
@// --- Switch ---

Status Display

@switch(orderStatus) { @case("pending") { Pending } @case("shipped", "in_transit") { In Transit } @case("delivered") { Delivered } @default { Unknown: ${orderStatus} } }
@// --- Includes / Partials ---

Included Partials

@for(card in cards) { @include("card.html", card) }
@// --- Raw block (no parsing) ---

Raw Block


    @raw {
Template syntax reference:
  ${expression}        - output (auto-escaped)
  ${raw expression}    - output (unescaped)
  ${expr | filter}     - piped through filter
  @if(cond) { }        - conditional
  @for(v in iter) { }  - loop
  @switch(e) { }       - switch
  @include("f.html")   - partial
  @extends("l.html")   - layout inheritance
  @raw { }             - literal (no parsing)
  @// comment          - stripped comment
    }
@// --- Auto HTML escaping ---

Auto Escaping

Escaped: ${dangerousInput}

Raw: ${raw dangerousInput}

@// --- Arithmetic in expressions ---

Arithmetic

Total items: ${itemCount * 2 + 1}

Discount: ${price * discount / 100}

}
